summary: 针对选中的 Review Compressor (compressor-3) 生成三个候选编辑提案，补全 outlet pressure target、minimum flow bypass percent 和 efficiency percent 三个缺失参数，以解决当前三个错误诊断。

answers.text: 检测到 Review Compressor 存在三个参数缺失错误：出口压力控制目标值、防喘振最小流量旁路百分比、以及效率基准百分比。已生成三个候选编辑提案，分别添加这些参数的占位符，供审查确认。

issues.message: Review Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.
Review Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.
Review Compressor is missing efficiency percent input required for current review baseline.

proposed_actions.title: 添加出口压力控制目标值占位符
proposed_actions.rationale: 压缩机配置为 outlet_pressure 控制模式，但缺少目标压力设定。根据诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_MISSING，需添加 outlet_pressure_target_kpa 参数占位符，供后续填入具体数值。

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Review Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Review Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_EFFICIENCY_BASELINE_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Review Compressor is missing efficiency percent input required for current review baseline.
